extraction.one_line_summary: HERSHEY Marc attacked solo at 1km to go on flattening gradient after QUINTANA visibly cracked on 12-13% ramps, stealing 4-second GC lead.
tactical_patterns: HERSHEY waited for QUINTANA's wheel to weave on steep ramps before attacking at flamme rouge when gradient flattened.
TURGIS Anthony launched kamikaze 10.5km solo from group, forcing UAE and Arkea to burn domestiques before key climb.
HERSHEY rode third wheel behind FORMOLO on final ramps, using teammate as pace judge to time late acceleration perfectly.

rider_signals.HERSHEY Marc: positive: tracked GC threats on steep ramps without teammates, then timed solo attack precisely when gradient eased at 1km
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: burned entire team before final climb, forced to chase alone when isolated on 12-13% gradients
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: visibly cracking on 12-13% ramps with weaving wheel, no longer able to handle sustained steep gradients
rider_signals.TURGIS Anthony: neutral: committed to 10.5km solo flyer but lacked power to sustain gap on approach to steep finish
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: positive: rode tempo for HERSHEY on final climb positioning, suggesting team tactical discipline for young rider's GC bid
